title: OpenPlanTrace Scan Result
description: Schema for the schema-versioned JSON emitted by OpenPlanTrace scan exports. The contract is strict about stable top-level fields and core evidence shapes, while allowing additional detector-specific fields for forward-compatible evolution.

unit.description: Logical drawing unit used by all exported page geometry.

detectedTag.description: Normalized deterministic industrial/equipment tag code recognized for this object candidate, when present.

detectedTagSourcePrimitiveId.description: Source primitive ID for the text or symbol evidence that supplied detectedTag.

detectedTags.description: Distinct deterministic tag codes recognized across candidate occurrences in this object group.

hostWallId.description: Primary wall identifier used as the placement anchor when one is available.

anchorWallIds.description: Wall segment ids used to derive the placement reference line. Split-wall openings can include both adjacent wall fragments.

referenceLine.description: Page-space line used as the local placement axis for offsets and direction vectors.

hostWallStartParameter.description: Opening start parameter on referenceLine where 0 is referenceLine.start and 1 is referenceLine.end.
